typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either narrow milestone feature-to-skill assignment to runtime-orchestration surfaces only, or broaden runtime-orchestration-worker procedure with an explicit branch for OpenBurnBarCore CLI-launch reliability features so validator command expectations stay aligned with assigned work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `misc-cli-launch-invoker-test-flake-hardening` was assigned `runtime-orchestration-worker` but required OpenBurnBarCore CLILaunchInvoker and script-level validation (`features.json` + review report for that feature). Current skill procedure is daemon-runtime focused (`BurnBarRunServiceTests`/`BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests`) and does not match this feature’s surface.
